name: Powder Keg
description: Throw a barrel that explodes after a delay, dealing spirit damage and applying knockup. The barrel can be detonated early by being shot, melee'd, or detonated by another barrel. Can be Alt-Cast to place the barrel infront of Holliday.
tier_descriptions: +80 Damage -5 Charge Time Improved Spirit Scaling

name: Bounce Pad
description: Drop a bounce pad in the world that launches any hero. You explode on landing, dealing Damage to any nearby enemies. The explosion can only occur once per person per Bounce Pad.
tier_descriptions: You and allies gain a +4m/s move speed bonus for 4s on landing

name: Spirit Lasso
description: Throw out your lasso, dealing spirit damage, pulling, and applying stun. Using a Bounce Pad extends the duration of Spirit Lasso.

name: Hat Trick
description: Throws out her hat to strike enemies, slowing and revealing them through walls.

name: Crackshot
description: Headshots deal bonus Damage and applies a Fading Move Speed penalty. This effect can only occur when off cooldown. Cooldown is reduced by 50% on NPC hits. Crackshot ignores range damage fall-off and does not apply to objectives.
tier_descriptions: -6s Cooldown on Hero Headshots. -3s on NPC Headshots

name: Shoulder Charge
description: Charge forward, pulling enemies you hit. Pushing a hero into a wall applies stun. If you collide with a hero you move faster during your charge.
tier_descriptions: -18s Cooldown On Hero Collide: +1.5 Weapon Damage for 6 s

name: Infernal Resilience
description: Gain bonus defensive attributes. Taking damage grants temporary regeneration for a portion of the damage taken.

name: Seismic Impact
description: Leap high into the air before crashing into the ground, dealing spirit damage and applying stun.
tier_descriptions: On cast, become Unstoppable for 6s and +6m Impact Radius

name: Siphon Life
description: Drain health from nearby enemies, dealing spirit damage over time and healing for a portion of the damage dealt.
tier_descriptions: +2m Radius and +18.0 DPS with improved Spirit scaling

name: Exploding Uppercut
description: Deal melee damage to nearby enemies and apply knockback. When they land, they deal spirit damage and apply reduced fire rate to other nearby enemies. Exploding Uppercut can be used on allies.
tier_descriptions: On Hero Hit: Gain fast spin-up time, 2x weapon range and +30% weapon damage for 9s
On Hero Hit: Set Grapple Arm cooldown to 0 and restores +18% of your missing health

name: Sticky Bomb
description: Attach a bomb that explodes after a delay, dealing spirit damage to nearby enemies. If the bomb hits or kills a hero, you gain permanent bonus damage on Sticky Bomb. Stacks diminish by half after 60 hits and 7 kills
tier_descriptions: On Cast: +5m Move Speed and +25% Debuff Resistance for 6s

name: Hyper Beam
description: Channel a powerful torrent of energy that deals spirit damage and applies slow.
tier_descriptions: Hyper Beam heals Bebop for 65% of its damage on Heroes. 20% on non-hero

name: Grapple Arm
description: Launch out a mechanical hand that pulls the first character it hits, reeling them in. Grapple Arm can be used on allies.

name: Sticky Bomb
description: Throw a Sticky Bomb that explodes after a delay, dealing spirit damage to nearby enemies. If the bomb hits a hero, it attaches to them and deals bonus spirit damage.

name: Pulse Grenade
description: Throw a grenade that begins pulsing when it lands. Each pulse expands the radius and applies spirit damage, time slow, and stacking increased damage for Paradox against the victim.
tier_descriptions: +20.0 Pulse Damage and increased Spirit scaling

name: Time Wall
description: Create a time warping wall that stops time for all enemy projectiles and bullets that touch it and increases the speed and damage of friendly bullets. Enemies that touch the wall will be briefly slowed and silenced.

name: Kinetic Carbine
description: Charge up a powerful shot of time energy, dealing spirit damage and applying a Time-Stop to enemies hit. The damage dealt increases with weapon damage. Move speed is increased while charging. While in the air and charging, to timeslow your movement.
tier_descriptions: +2s Charge Hold Duration and +55% Damage Scaling

name: Paradoxical Swap
description: Fire a projectile that swaps your position with the target enemy hero.
tier_descriptions: 200 Barrier for 8s. Barrier scales with Spirit
Swaps all enemies within 7m of hit target and +10% Max Health Damage

name: Kinetic Pulse
description: Release an energy pulse that travels along the ground, dealing spirit damage and applying knockup.
tier_descriptions: On Hit: -15% Bullet Resist and -30% Move Speed for 4s

name: Quantum Entanglement
description: Briefly become untargetable while teleporting to the target location. Restores stamina upon use.: Bring nearby allies with you.
tier_descriptions: Reduces non-ult debuffs by 50% Replenishes 1 Charge

name: Rejuvenating Aurora
description: While channeling, restore health over time to you and any allies nearby. You can dash and melee without breaking the channel.
tier_descriptions: Aura provides +4m Move Speed during channel
Full move and ability use and additionally heals +2.5% of Max Health per second

name: Singularity
description: Create a singularity in your hands, dealing spirit damage over time, applying stun, and pulling in nearby enemies.

name: Medicinal Specter
description: Deploy a spirit that provides healing to nearby allies.
tier_descriptions: +2.0% Max Health regen per second, +3m Heal Radius and +1.5s Duration

name: Mini Turret
description: Deploy a turret that shoots enemies, dealing spirit damage over time. The turret expires after a limited lifetime. Turrets deal reduced damage to troopers and objectives.
tier_descriptions: +25% Turret Fire Rate and +12s Turret Lifetime

name: Spectral Wall
description: Cast a wall that applies slow on enemies it passes through. Erupt the wall to divide the terrain in half and damage nearby enemies. After casting, press or Ability 3 to erupt the wall early. Can be Destroyed with Melee Attacks
tier_descriptions: Amplifies McGinnis's damage by +20% on hit enemies for 7s
Deploy 2 Mini Turrets near the wall for 8s +30% Slow

name: Heavy Barrage
description: Unleashes a volley of rockets that home in on a targeted location. McGinnis is slowed and is still able to use stamina.
tier_descriptions: Applies 30% movement and dash slow for 1s
+2m Radius and +15.0 Damage per Rocket with increased spirit scaling

name: Essence Bomb
description: Sacrifice some of your health to launch a bomb that deals damage after a brief arm time. Self damage type is Spirit and can be mitigated.
tier_descriptions: Bombs leave a toxic mess on the ground, dealing 26.0% of the original damage per second, for 6s.

name: Malice
description: Sacrifice some of your health to launch blood shards that apply a stack of Malice. Each stack slows the victim and increases the damage they take from you. The slow effect decreases over time.

name: Life Drain
description: Create a tether that drains enemy health over time and heals you. Target must be in line of sight and within max range to drain. You can shoot and use other abilities during the drain, but your move speed is reduced. to give health to friendly Heroes.
tier_descriptions: Enables and Grants +2 Charges. Increases spirit scaling.

name: Soul Exchange
description: Swaps health levels with an enemy target. There is a minimum health percentage that enemies can be brought down to and a minimum amount of health received based on victims current health.
tier_descriptions: On cast, +60 Spirit Power, +40% Fire Rate and +50% Spirit Resistance for 8s.

name: Lightning Ball
description: Shoot a ball of lightning that travels in a straight line. Does damage to all targets in its radius. Slows down when damaging enemies and stops if it hits the world.
tier_descriptions: -35% move speed on hit targets and +1s Lifetime

name: Static Charge
description: Apply a charge to a target enemy hero. After a short duration, the static charge stuns and damages enemies within the radius.

name: Static Charge
description: Strike in front of you with lightning, applying a charge to the unit or area hit. After a short duration, the static charge stuns and damages enemies within the radius.

name: Power Surge
description: Power up your weapon with a shock effect, making your bullets proc shock damage on your target. This shock damage bounces to enemies near your target. Occurs once per burst shot.
tier_descriptions: +3m Move Speed +8 Damage and increased scaling

name: Storm Cloud
description: Channel an expanding storm cloud around you that damages all enemies within its radius. Enemies do not take damage when they are out of line-of-sight.
tier_descriptions: +55% Bullet Resist while channeling Storm Cloud
+7s Channel Time +10m Final Radius +5m Initial Radius

name: Sleep Dagger
description: Throw a dagger that damages and sleeps the target. Sleeping targets wake up shortly after being damaged. Throwing a Dagger does not break your invisibility. Sleep Dagger does not interrupt enemies' channeling abilities.
tier_descriptions: -10.0% Bullet Resist Reduction for 6.0s on wake-up
+1s Sleep Duration -50% Move and Dash Speed for 3s on wake-up

name: Smoke Bomb
description: Fade out of sight, becoming invisible and gaining sprint speed. Attacking removes invisibility, but using items does not. Close enemies can see through your invisibility.
tier_descriptions: Dispels non-ult debuffs Grants +50% Bullet Lifesteal for 5s

name: Fixation
description: Shooting a target increases your bullet damage on that target. Gain one stack per bullet hit, two if the hit is a headshot.
tier_descriptions: 40.0 Spirit damage and 15% slow for 2s to target every 20 stacks

name: Bullet Dance
description: Enter a flurry, firing your weapon at nearby enemies with perfect accuracy and added Bullet Damage.

name: Stake
description: Throw a stake that tethers enemies to the location where the stake lands. Enemy movement is restricted to the length of the tether.

name: Flight
description: Leap into the air and fly. While in flight your weapon deals bonus spirit damage and your items have increased range.
tier_descriptions: Hero Kills Refresh Duration. +10.0 Spirit Damage with increased Spirit scaling

name: Crow Familiar
description: Your crow familiar deals impact damage, reduces their bullet resist and applies a bleed that deals damage based on the target's current health.

name: Assassinate
description: Use your scoped rifle to fire a powerful shot over long distances. Deal only partial damage until fully charged after 1.0s of being scoped. Does bonus damage to enemies with less than 50% health remaining. Landing a killing blow on a player with Assassinate grants you bonus weapon damage.

name: Concussive Combustion
description: Become a living bomb, dealing spirit damage and applying stun to all nearby enemies after a delay. Once cast, Concussive Combustion cannot be interrupted.

name: Flame Dash
description: Dash forward, gaining slow resistance while leaving a flaming trail that deals spirit damage over time. Hold [W] while active to dash farther.
tier_descriptions: Enable 2 Ability Charges with 14s Recharge time

name: Napalm
description: Spew an incendiary mixture, dealing spirit damage, applying slow, and coating targets in napalm.
tier_descriptions: Napalm Effect: +17% Damage Taken and -33% Healing

name: Afterburn
description: Weapon hits build up a burning effect, dealing spirit damage over time. Abilities refresh to the base burn duration and weapon hits extend it.

name: Arctic Beam
description: Shoot freezing cold energy out in front of you, damaging targets and progressively reducing their movement and fire rate the longer you sustain the beam on them. You have reduced move speed while using Arctic Beam. The beam may also claim Souls.
tier_descriptions: -25.0% to Fire Rate and Move Speed
-13s Cooldown and Fires 2 additional Arctic Beams within 10m of the last target hit.

name: Ice Path
description: Kelvin creates a floating trail of ice and snow that gives movement bonuses to him and his allies. Kelvin gains 60% slow resistance for the duration. Enemies can also walk on the floating trail. Press Dash / Crouch / slide to travel up or down while in Ice Path.
tier_descriptions: +2m Move Speed and +35% Bullet Resist for Kelvin while on Ice Path
+35% Spirit and +20 Spirit for Kelvin while on Ice Path

name: Frost Grenade
description: Throw a grenade that explodes in a cloud of freezing ice that heals allies and applies spirit damage and move speed reduction to enemies.
tier_descriptions: -10 Cooldown and debuff now freezes Stamina Regen
+2m Radius. Damage and Heal Spirit Scaling increased.

name: Frozen Shelter
description: Target yourself or a Hero to freeze the air and create an impenetrable dome around them. While in the dome, allies gain rapid regeneration and enemies are slowed. Objectives becomes Invulnerable and Frozen under Frozen Shelter
tier_descriptions: Purges non-ult debuffs for you and your allies. +65 Health Regen that now scales with Spirit

name: Grapple
description: Pull yourself through the air toward a target. Using Grapple also resets your limit of air jumps and dashes.
tier_descriptions: +20m Cast Range and gain +7.0 Weapon Damage for 10s
+1 Charges OnCast: +1 Stamina and +60% Air Control

name: Ground Strike
description: Stomp the ground beneath you, damaging enemies in front of you. If you perform Ground Strike while airborne, you quickly dive towards the ground. Damage grows slower after 25m.
tier_descriptions: Struck enemies are knocked up and slowed by 50% for 3s
Damage Per Meter +110% and improved scaling

name: Death Slam
description: Focus on enemies to connect whips to them. After channeling, connected enemies are lifted and stunned then slammed into the ground. Your victims and any enemies in the landing zone will be damaged and slowed. Press to throw connected enemies early. Enemies that are not in line of sight or go out of range during the latch time will not be grabbed.
tier_descriptions: Stun enemies in Radius for 1.2s +6m Cast Range

name: Flog
description: Strike enemies in front of you with your whip, healing for a portion of the damage dealt.

name: Dust Devil
description: Transform yourself into a whirlwind that travels forward, damaging enemies, slowing their move speed and lifting them up in the air. After emerging from the tornado you gain bullet evasion.
tier_descriptions: Recast within 6s. +0.3s Lift Duration Increases spirit scaling.

name: Djinn's Mark
description: Active: Consume all Djinn Mark's to deal its damage now.
tier_descriptions: On Proc: Apply a fading 60% Slow for 0.8s
-1s Cooldown +1 Max Marks Stun Victim for 0.5s on Max Marks

name: Fire Scarabs
description: Infest an enemy with fire scarabs, stealing life from them and causing them to deal reduced damage.

name: Traveler
description: Target a location on the minimap. After a brief wait, teleport to that location. Taking damage during the wait period causes the teleport to be interrupted.
tier_descriptions: +3m Move Speed and +20% Fire Rate for 12s

name: Scorn
description: Deal damage to nearby enemies and heal yourself based on the damage done. Heal is stronger against enemy heroes.
tier_descriptions: Adds a debuff to enemies that lets Mo & Krill deal +15% Damage to them. Stacks and lasts 16s.

name: Burrow
description: Burrow underground, moving faster, and gaining spirit and bullet armor. Damage from enemy heroes will reduce the speed bonus. When you jump out, deal spirit damage, slow, and knockup.

name: Sand Blast
description: Spray sand that disarms enemies in front of you and deals damage.
tier_descriptions: Slow targets by -30% and reduces dash distances by -30%

name: Combo
description: Hold the target in place, stunning them and dealing damage during the channel. If they die during, or within 3 seconds of Combo ending, you permanently gain max health.
tier_descriptions: +0.7s Duration and +40.0 Damage Per Second and increased scaling

name: Sekhmet's Spirit
description: Send a Spirit Cat forward that grab's targets in its way. Grabbing a Hero will cause an explosion soon after. Press Ability 1 to manually create the explosion.

name: Pounce
description: Leap at a target to inflict Light Melee damage and slow on nearby enemies. You may use Pounce on a second target if used within 3s
tier_descriptions: Reloads up to 20% of your ammo and applies +30% Fire Rate Slow.

name: Nekomata Ward
description: Deploy a Statue to track enemies in an area. The Ward will also attack enemies recently damaged by {s:hero_name}. Targeted enemies have reduced healing and heal {s:hero_name} when damaged.
tier_descriptions: Statues gain Invisibility when not attacking.
-30% Damage Reduction and -30% Heal Reduction on targets.

name: Queen of Shadows
description: Mark your enemies and bathe yourself in shadow to strengthen your attacks and make yourself Invisible. Attacking will only temporarily reveal you. Hitting enemies with Melee damage will reduce their bullet resist (stacking)
tier_descriptions: Heavy Melee attacks cause Silence for 3s

name: Ava
description: Turn to shadows and possess Ava. You gain bonus move speed that increases over time, and become hidden on the minimap. Taking damage from an enemy hero resets your bonus move speed and puts Ava on a brief cooldown.
tier_descriptions: Gain Damage Amp over time, up to 20%. Lingers for 6s

name: Gloom Bombs
description: Throw a cluster of bombs that detonate after a delay, dealing spirit damage. Enemies hit by multiple bombs take 65% damage.
tier_descriptions: Per Bomb Touch: -6% Melee Resist for 6s

name: Return to Shadows
description: Instantly turn to shadows, becoming untargetable, gaining bonus move speed, and dealing spirit damage. After a delay, return from the shadows, dealing spirit damage again.
tier_descriptions: On Completion: Heal for 450 and refund all ability cooldowns

name: Leaping Slash
description: Dash forward before slashing all enemies in a circle, dealing melee damage. If the ability hits at least one hero, heal a small amount of health.
tier_descriptions: +60 Damage & On Hero Hit: 50% Cooldown Refund

name: Charged Shot
description: Charge up a powerful shot that pierces through enemies. Hold Ability 1 or to hold the shot.
tier_descriptions: Improved damage scaling and -3s Charge Delay

name: Rain of Arrows
description: Launches you high in the air, allowing you to glide slowly. While airborne, you gain Weapon Damage and multishot on your weapon. for reduced jump height. Press Jump / mantle to cancel the glide.
tier_descriptions: While airborne, +3 Weapon Damage and weapon damage applies 30% movement slow for 1.5s
While airborne, +30% Bullet Lifesteal, +30% Spirit Lifesteal and +30% Bullet Evasion

name: Spirit Snare
description: Throw out a trap that begins to arm itself. Once armed, the trap will trigger when an enemy enters its radius, applying Curse and Movement Slow that interrupts, Silences, Disarms, and prevents item usage. Hit the trap with a Charged Shot to detonate early with increased radius.

name: Guided Owl
description: After 1.5s cast time, launch a spirit owl that you control and which explodes on impact, damaging and stunning enemies. Hold [W] to accelerate the owl. Press Jump / mantle to release control. Gain permanent Spirit Power for each enemy hero killed with Guided Owl.
tier_descriptions: After hit, kills enemies that are below 22% Health

name: Serrated Knives
description: Throw a knife that bleeds an enemy. Each additional hit adds a stack and refreshes the bleed duration, causing the bleed to increase per stack.
tier_descriptions: +12.0 Bleed DPS with increased Spirit scaling

name: Slice and Dice
description: Perform a dash forward, damaging enemies along the path. Hit Enemies have their spirit resist reduced. This debuff can stack.
tier_descriptions: +50 Impact Damage -2s Cooldown per Hero hit.

name: Bloodletting
description: Take only a portion of incoming damage immediately and defer the rest to be taken over time. Activate to clear a portion of the deferred damage.

name: Killing Blow
tier_descriptions: +6 m Range +2 m/s in Full Rage.

name: Flying Cloak
description: Launch a sentient cloak that travels forward and damages enemies. You can press Ability 2 to teleport to its location.

name: Enchanter's Satchel
description: Escape into your suitcase. When the duration ends, deal spirit damage to nearby enemies. Duration can be ended early by performing any action.
tier_descriptions: +1.5s Duration +4m Radius -40% Move Speed and Fire Rate for 4.0s

name: Barrage
description: Channel to start launching projectiles that deal spirit damage and apply slow around their impact point. Projectiles that hit a hero grant Pocket increased damage that stacks. Casting while airborne will cause Pocket to float. Casting AirDash or Flying Cloaking will not cancel Barrage.

name: Affliction
description: Applies damage over time to enemies nearby. Affliction's damage is non-lethal and does not apply item procs.
tier_descriptions: Prevents all healing +14.0 DPS with increase Spirit scaling

name: Kudzu Connection
description: Connect with a nearby ally to gain bonuses, replicated healing, and ignore the move speed penalty while shooting. Receive 50% of Bonuses with no connection Connection requires line of sight.

name: Entangling Thorns
description: Summon a patch of choking thorns that damage and slows enemies in its radius.
tier_descriptions: +2m Radius and increased DPS Spirit scaling
Enemies caught in thorns for 2.0s are Immobilized for +1.6s

name: Stone Form
description: Turn yourself into impervious stone and smash into the ground, stunning and damaging enemies nearby. Heals you for a percentage of your max health.
tier_descriptions: +1s Stun Duration and increased Damage spirit scaling

name: Air Drop
description: Grab an ally and take flight with them. Drop your ally to cause an explosion, dealing spirit damage. You and your ally gain increased Outgoing Damage when flying ends. Cooldown reduced by 30% when used on allies. Taking damage briefly disables using the ability. While lifted, your ally cannot attack and deals -20% damage.
tier_descriptions: On Fly End: 300 Barrier to Ivy and ally that scales with Spirit
Silence for 3s on enemies hit. Increases damage and barrier scaling.

name: Splatter
description: Throw a ball of goo that deals damage and leaves puddles of goo behind that apply movement slow to enemies in the radius.
tier_descriptions: Bounces 2 times and improves Spirit Scaling

name: The Cube
description: Encase the target in a cube of restorative goo that protects from damage, and increases health regen. Target is unable to take any new actions while cubed. Can be used on self. Press Jump / mantle to escape early.
tier_descriptions: Increases Move Speed and Stamina Recovery
Removes all non-ult Debuffs and -25.0s Cooldown

name: Goo Ball
description: Morph into a large goo ball that deals damage and stuns enemies on impact. The ball grants large amounts of Bullet and Spirit resist, bounces off walls and can double jump.

name: Puddle Punch
description: Materialize a fist in the world that punches everyone in the area, applying knockup. Punching an enemy deals melee damage and applies slow. You and your allies have increased Air Control.
tier_descriptions: -14.0s Cooldown and now deals Heavy Melee Damage

name: Binding Word
description: Curse an enemy hero. If they don't move away from their initial position within the escape time, they will be damaged and immobilized.
tier_descriptions: Warden deals +20% more Bullet Damage to trapped Heroes for 5s
-14s Cooldown Silences enemies until they escape or are immobilized

name: Willpower
description: Gain a Barrier and bonus move speed.
tier_descriptions: +40% Debuff Resistance and improved Barrier scaling

name: Alchemical Flask
description: Throw a flask that damages and reduces the weapon damage and move speed of enemies it hits.
tier_descriptions: -7s Cooldown and +2m Radius Applies -30% Fire Rate

name: Last Stand
description: After charging for 2s, release pulses that damage enemies and heal you based on the damage done. While channeling Last Stand you have greatly increased bullet and spirit resist.
tier_descriptions: +4s Duration Unstoppable and +30% Resists while channeling

name: Telekinesis
description: Lift an enemy hero into the air and then slam them towards the target location.
tier_descriptions: +1.5s Debuff Duration and +6m Throw and Cast Range

name: Project Mind
description: Teleport to the targeted location.
tier_descriptions: 300 Barrier for 5s. Barrier scales with Spirit Power.

name: Full Auto
description: Temporarily boosts your fire rate and deal bonus spirit damage
tier_descriptions: Unlimited Ammo and Increased Scaling on Spirit Damage Per Bullet

name: Card Trick
description: Deal weapon damage to summon cards of a random suit. Each card can be thrown, dealing damage and applying a different effect depending of its suit. Cards thrown fly towards the enemy or point under your crosshair. Alt-cast to throw first card
tier_descriptions: All suits are improved and higher chance for Jokers

name: Wrecking Ball
description: Create a large ball of scrap that can be thrown, damaging and stunning the first enemy hit. The ball takes time to create and you move slower while carrying it.

name: Consume
description: Latches onto an Enemy, damaging them and healing yourself while attached. Targets must be in line of sight and within max range to stay latched. A successful kill also restores a Bio Blast charge.

name: Bio Blast
description: Shoots out a blast of consumed remains, damaging and slowing enemies. Multiple hits increase the slow.

name: Magnetic Flux
description: Grabs any enemy looked at by Wrecker, putting them in stasis and holding them overhead. Stuns, and damages all captured enemies when finished. Any grabbed NPCs are salvaged.

name: Astral Walk
description: Launch a flying shadow copy of yourself that you control, teleporting your original body to wherever it lands. The teleport explosion slows enemies and deals damage based on how long you were flying.

name: Overload
description: Create an area that slows nearby enemies and damages them after a channel. Damage scales with total channel time.

name: Wrecking Ball
description: Create a large ball of scrap, damaging and stunning the first enemy hit. Nearby enemies take reduced damage.

name: Power Slash
description: Channel to increase damage over 1.4 seconds, then release a fully-charged sword strike. Press Ability 1 or to trigger the strike early, dealing partial damage.
tier_descriptions: +8m Cast Range +150.0 Damage and Increases Spirit Power scaling

name: Flying Slash
description: Throw a grappling hook to reel yourself towards an enemy, dealing Light melee damage and slowing the target when you arrive.
tier_descriptions: Can Grapple to allies +15m Cast Range Gains 2 extra charges

name: Crimson Slash
description: Slash enemies in front of you, damaging them and slowing their fire rate. If any enemy heroes are hit, you heal.
tier_descriptions: On Hero Hit: +6% Max Health Heal

name: Shadow Transformation
description: Become infused with Yamato's shadow soul. After an initial invincible transformation your abilities are refreshed and are 60% faster. You gain immunity to negative status effects and have greatly increased bullet and spirit resist. When you get a hero kill, you heal and the duration is extended.

name: Hook Blade
description: Throw a blade, dealing Spirit Damage. The blade then hooks back, applying Spirit Damage again and applying a Slow.

name: Slither
description: You have increased Slide Distance, can Slide up hills, and can turn faster while Sliding.

name: Lethal Venom
description: Inject a target with lethal venom. After a delay the venom triggers, dealing Spirit Damage. The damage is increased by the target's missing health. Lethal Venom will ignore Petrify's damage block.
tier_descriptions: Bullets also build up Lethal Venom

name: Petrify
description: Create a hexed area on the ground. After a delay, ALL units in the cylindrical area are Petrified. Enemies also suffer Spirit Damage. Petrified units block all damage, but cannot take actions.

name: Screwjab Dagger
description: Throw a dagger, dealing spirit damage and applying slow. Every subsequent dagger against the same target stacks in spirit damage and slow.
tier_descriptions: On Hit: -8% Bullet Resist and -6% Bullet Resist per Stack
+ 2 Max Stacks -2s Charge Delay On Hit: Refund 55% Charge Cooldown

name: Petrifying Bola
description: Throw an explosive bola. On exploding, the bola Slows and Damages all enemies in the area. Direct hits deal Additional Damage and Petrify instead. Petrified units block all damage, but cannot take actions.
tier_descriptions: + 1.0s Petrify Duration. Petrifies all enemies in the area.

name: Vexing Bolt
description: Fire a bolt of magic that deals Damage, increasing as it travels. If you have an Assistant, they also cast Vexing Bolt at reduced damage. Press Ability 1 to redirect the bolt towards your crosshairs.
tier_descriptions: Bolts apply -25% Fire Rate for 5 s.

name: Rabbit Hex
description: Hex a target, transforming them into a Rabbit for a limited duration. Rabbits are small and move faster, but take increased Damage and are unable to perform most actions. Hex does not interrupt abilities.

name: The Great Homonculus!
description: Create a Copy of yourself with reduced health and damage. When the clone dies or expires it explodes, dealing Spirit Damage. The Copy cannot use their Ultimate ability.
tier_descriptions: Copy can cast their Ultimate Ability.

name: Spectral Assistant
description: Summon an Assistant at the targeted location. The Assistant attacks whenever you fire your weapon, dealing Damage. While the Assistant is out, you can press Ability 2 to swap positions with your Assistant. Casting Spectral Assistant also reloads your weapon.

name: Captive Audience
description: Target an enemy. You and the target enemy are bound on Stage, unable to leave. All other characters are pushed out of the radius.

name: Grand Finale!
description: Prepare three AMAZING bolts of magic. Each bolt applies a Fading Slow and deals Spirit Damage, increased for every bolt fired.
tier_descriptions: +50 Damage Per Bolt. Refund 1 Bolt per Kill

name: Escape Artist
description: Blink to the target location. On arrival, briefly gain movement speed and become Invisible. [Cast] Appear at the target location. Appear in place. Enemies will not know which cast you performed.

name: Audience Participation
description: Copy the Ultimate of an enemy hero for a limited time. Reactivating the ability will use the Copied Ultimate instead. Copies will inherit this ability's upgrade points. Audience Participation will also copy the cooldown.

name: Rabbit Hex
description: Hex a target area and transforming all enemies into a Rabbit for a limited duration. Rabbits are small and move faster, but take increased Damage and are unable to perform most actions. Hex does not interrupt abilities.

name: Bottled Phantasmicide
description: Throw a jar that leaves a spreading toxic pool. Enemies caught in the pool are Slowed and Silenced.
tier_descriptions: -25 % Spirit Resist for enemies in the pool

name: Crawling Plague
description: Release a wave of spectral spiders that chase enemies and explode, dealing Spirit Damage. Hit enemies are poisoned, temporarily losing Spirit and Spirit Resist. This effect can stack multiple times.

name: Pest Barrier
description: Apply a Combat Barrier to a target ally and periodically deal Spirit Damage and Slows.

name: Spectral Silk
description: Dealing Spirit Damage builds an increasing Slow. Once full, the buildup is consumed to apply an Immobilize and a burst of Spirit Damage. This effect has a cooldown per target.

name: Silktrap
description: Create a thread of web between two surfaces. Enemies who touch the web take Damage over time, become Slowed and are Revealed.
tier_descriptions: + 2 s Debuff Duration. The Web also Silences for 2.5 s

name: Umbrella Maneuver
description: Use your umbrella to catch a gust of wind that lifts you backwards. You then charge up your umbrella to fire a projectile that explodes on impact.

name: Revelation
description: Activate your relic. Enemy heroes nearby have slowed movement and dashes, and receive damage over time when looking towards you. If enemies look at you long enough, they get cursed.

name: Flame Imp
description: Throw a projectile, infused with an imp's spirit. It posseses the enemy, dealing Damage over time. If the target dies while possessed, the imp jumps to another nearby enemy, refreshing its duration.
tier_descriptions: +25 DPS. Spreads to +1 targets after death.

name: Sleight of Hand
description: Performing a Dash or Slide loads your weapon with an empowered bullet that deals bonus Damage, equal to a percentage of your Weapon Damage. If you're out of bullets, you'll find an extra one. How lucky.
tier_descriptions: Gain +2 m/s Move Speed while empowered
Deal an additional +25% weapon damage for 5s against the victim

name: Hellfire Salvo
description: Load your weapon with demonic rounds. After a delay, you empower your next shots to deal bonus damage and penetrate enemies.

name: Demontrigger Blitz
description: Load your weapon with demonic rounds. After a delay, release a blitz of bullets at the target enemy, dealing bonus Damage. Enemies can intercept the bullets.

name: Infernal Brand
description: Passively mark nearby enemies with a Brand. Shooting an enemy with a Brand consumes the effect, dealing bonus Damage and granting Fire Rate and Movement Speed.

name: Sanguine Retreat
description: Briefly disperse, becoming untargetable and flying to a target location. Can be recast within a brief window.
tier_descriptions: On Cast: Gain +25% Fire Rate for 8s and add 8 bullets

name: Love Bites
description: Your bullets apply additional spirit damage. Dealing damage your abilities builds up to a vicious bite, dealing a burst of bonus spirit damage. Love Bites has a unique cooldown per target.
tier_descriptions: +3.0 Spirit Damage per Bullet & +45.0 Bonus Damage
-5 Cooldown On Proc: +25% Fire Rate for 5s

name: Nox Nostra
description: Active: Unleash a cloud of bats that seek out targets, each dealing spirit damage and applying Silence. Passive: Triggering Love Bites against heroes permanently increases the number of bats released.
tier_descriptions: On Hit: Deal +0.5% Current Health as Damage

name: Rake
tier_descriptions: +7.0% Missing health damage and increased Heal per Kill Spirit scaling

name: Intertwine
description: Enemies hit by spirit damage are linked to other linked enemies, sharing a portion of incoming damage as bonus spirit damage.

name: Skipshot
description: Throw a projectile that bounces between targets, dealing spirit damage. If there are no enemies nearby Skipshot will instead bounce off of Boho, reducing its cooldown.

name: Swish
description: Swing twice, dealing spirit damage to targets in front. Hits against heroes grant bonus move speed and stacking barrier.

name: Jeté
description: Leap in a target direction. If no direction is chosen, then leap straight up instead.

name: Acrobat
description: Gain stacking bonuses every time you dash, double jump, wall jump, or teleport. Gaining new stacks refreshes the duration.

name: Flakshot
description: Bullets deal bonus weapon damage and can ricochet off of surfaces.

name: Lifethread
description: Fire a line that attaches to the world, allowing you to swing. Lifethread resets all air jumps and air dashes.

name: Jumpstart
description: Deal spirit damage to yourself. Then, gain bonus regeneration and bonus move speed, decaying over time.
tier_descriptions: +1 Charge +50% Debuff Resistance Increases spirit scaling

name: Aura of Suffering
description: Unleash pain, dealing spirit damage over time to both enemies and yourself. The damage continues to increase the longer the ability is channeled, up to a maximum amount.
tier_descriptions: Enemies receive 25% Move and Dash Slow

name: Shocking Reanimation
description: Release a wave after taking lethal damage, applying a diminishing slow. After a brief channel you reanimate, dealing spirit damage and applying stun to nearby enemies.
tier_descriptions: While On Cooldown: Gain +15% Fire Rate and 6.0 Spirit Damage per Bullet

name: Pain Battery
description: Taking any damage passively charges up your Pain Battery. Once full, activating the ability fires multiple shocking bolts, dealing spirit damage once per target.
tier_descriptions: On Hero Hit: Heal for 15% of your missing health and increased Spirit scaling

name: Bookwyrm
description: Conjure a dragon that appears at the target location before flying forward, dealing spirit damage and leaving a burning path in its trail.

name: Captivating Read
description: Target an area with latent magic, applying slow. The magic detonates after a delay, dealing spirit damage and applying immobilize.
tier_descriptions: +1m Radius On Hit: Reduce Spirit Resist by -18% for 6s

name: Plot Armor
description: Grant an ally a barrier. While the barrier holds, they gain bonus weapon damage.
tier_descriptions: Affects up to 2 additional allies. Increases barrier scaling.

name: Rallying Charge
description: Release a wave of spectral knights and steeds that charge across the entire city, healing allies and dealing spirit damage to enemies. The strength of the heal and spirit damage is amplified as the knights travel further.

name: Doorway
description: Place two connected doors in the world. Players and most projectiles entering one door will exit out through the other. The doors will close at the end of the duration. The two doors must be placed within the doorway distance of each other.
tier_descriptions: Grants a Barrier first time traveling through doors
+30m Cast Range. +45m Doorway Distance and scales with Spirit Power.

name: Luggage Cart
description: Send out a luggage Cart that deals spirit damage and pulls enemy heroes along its path. Can be alt cast with to target friendly heroes instead.
tier_descriptions: +20m Cast Range +75 Damage on wall impact
-15s Cooldown and 1.25s stun on wall impact

name: Call Bell
description: Throw out a call bell that deals spirit damage on impact. After a short delay it explodes, dealing additional spirit damage and causing affected enemies to suffer reduced weapon accuracy and movement slow. Can be shot to detonate early.

name: Hotel Guest
description: Send the target's physical body to be a guest at the Baroness Hotel. The guest is to promptly make their way to the exit elevator, where they'll be sent back to their original position. A stay at the Baroness Hotel is paid for in spirit damage. Failure to check-out on time costs additional spirit damage.
tier_descriptions: +150 Damage +1.5s Stun on Failure to Check Out
Unstoppable while the Baroness is occupied. 13s Cooldown on Failure to Check Out.

name: Blasted
description: Passive: Melee hits restore ammo and inflict wrecked on the victim for 7.0s.
tier_descriptions: +1 Bashdown Charge on use and +7% Wrecked Bullet Amp
+50 Melee Bonus Health and increases spirit scaling

name: Chain Gang
description: Chain nearby enemies to you. Chained enemies cannot use movement abilities and receive a heavy slow when they pull on the chain. After a delay, yank everyone towards Billy and deal spirit damage. The chain breaks if you lose line of sight for a short while.
tier_descriptions: +5m Range +1.3s of Unstoppable Per Hero pulled in

name: Rising Ram
description: Charge head-first into an enemy and send them into the air along with Billy. Cooldown reduced by 50% on impact.

name: Bashdown
description: Slam your bat into the ground, pulling enemies down and dealing melee damage. The slam creates a shockwave that deals spirit damage and applies knockup.
tier_descriptions: -3.0s Charge Time Now deals 50% Heavy Melee Damage

name: Rend
description: Swipe at enemies in a cone ahead of you, dealing spirit damage. If the enemy is in close range, deal bonus melee damage.
tier_descriptions: Deals 55% Heavy Melee Damage Silences enemies for 2.3s if close range

name: Stalker's Mark
description: Send out a mark that bleeds the first target it hits, dealing spirit damage over time. While the enemy is bleeding you can re-activate Stalker's Mark to instantly appear behind their back.

name: Bloodscent
tier_descriptions: +3m/s Move Speed when around an isolated enemy hero
On isolated hero death: Heal 24% of your missing health and restores 2 Stamina

name: Eternal Night
description: Surround nearby enemy heroes in darkness, severely limiting their vision of other units. Affected enemies are briefly revealed to you and are considered isolated for the duration. You gain bonus sprint speed.

name: Gutshot
description: Fire a blast with your shotgun, dealing weapon damage and pushing enemies back. Enemies near a wall receive stun and take bonus weapon damage.
tier_descriptions: On Wall Stun: Your next heavy melee is blessed

name: Potent Vapors
description: Burn your censer, reducing incoming damage and healing over time. You cannot attack while Potent Vapors is active.

name: Grit
description: Taking damage grants stacking bullet resist and spirit resist that expires over time.

name: Witching Hour
description: Equip your crossbow, changing your weapon to deal pure damage and apply a brief slow.

name: Ira Domini
description: Load your crossbow with 3 stakes, dealing massively increased weapon damage. The final stake is blessed, dealing bonus pure damage and executing low-health enemies.
tier_descriptions: While Active: Gain 1.2 m/s Move Speed

name: Teargas Grenade
description: Throw a tear gas grenade that detonates after a delay, blocking vision. Enemies in the area have reduced fire rate.
tier_descriptions: On Debuff: Drain -1 Stamina per Second

name: Blessed Tac-Vest
description: Gain passive barrier that grants bullet resist and spirit resist. The barrier repairs itself when out of combat.
tier_descriptions: On Barrier Break: Gain 35% Weapon Damage for 6s

name: Choking Incense
description: Throw a censer that leaves a spreading cloud. Enemies caught in the cloud are Slowed and Silenced.

name: Consecrating Grenade
description: Fire a grenade that bounces before exploding, dealing weapon damage and setting enemies on fire. Burning targets deal pure damage to enemies in the area and suffer from reduced healing.

name: Hex-Lined Snap Trap
description: Kick a trap that arms after a brief delay. The trap springs on the first enemy it touches, dealing spirit damage, applying immobilize, and revealing enemies for a duration afterwards.
tier_descriptions: +1 Charge Deal +30% damage against revealed targets

name: Pillow Toss
description: Throw your trusty pillow inflicting spirit damage and heavy knockback. Landing hits reduces the cooldown of your other abilities.

name: Naptime
description: Cast your gaze forward, piercing walls and floors. Enemies in the gaze are slowed, have reduced dash distance, and cannot use movement abilities. When the channel ends they fall asleep before waking up to a splitting headache that deals heavy spirit damage.
tier_descriptions: -1 Stamina On Wake and no Stamina Regen while sleeping
-55s cooldown Reduced damage and unstoppable while channeling

name: Lil Helpers
description: Signal a Helper to lend a hand. They can collect boxes, do Sinner's Sacrifices, or be sent to support allies and troopers. Follow a hero: Provides a short burst of spirit resist and fading move speed. Follow a trooper: Provides healing, damage, resists, and allows tagging along. When no hero is around, souls from trooper kills are split amongst the team. Can be cast during Tag Along. Helpers will take a nap for 15.1s after following someone.

name: Tag Along
description: Jump to an ally and nap alongside them. Both you and the ally receive a burst heal based on missing health followed by lingering regeneration. Hop between allies with Ability 2 to apply the heal, once per ally. You are knocked off if stunned by an ultimate ability. You can use items and all self-casts target your ally instead.
tier_descriptions: 35% Bonus Item Range, Duration, and Barrier Effectiveness while napping
+15% Spirit Power and +35 Spirit Power while napping and for 10s after napping Improved Spirit Scaling

name: Hop To Ally
description: Hop to another ally and refresh the regeneration duration, once per ally.

name: Disengaging Sigil
description: Draw a sigil sphere in front of you and then leap backwards as it explodes, damaging and slowing enemies caught in it.
tier_descriptions: Gain +25% Fire Rate and +25% Bullet Speed for 8s
On Player Hit: +1 stamina restored and resets Air Jump/Dash limit

name: Riposte
description: Prepare to deflect the next incoming attack. On a successful deflection, briefly become invulnerable and target an enemy hero to dash towards them, stunning them and reducing their Melee Resist. Press Ability 2 to select a target. Does not trigger against trooper or neutral damage.

name: Flawless Advance
description: Perform a series of lunges in any direction, delivering piercing stabs ahead of you. Hold your ability key to time your attacks, dealing more damage the longer it's held. Releasing your attack during the perfect window deals maximum damage. Press Ability 3 to re-cast.
tier_descriptions: -12s Cooldown. Gain +60% Bullet Resist during lunge
+65 Perfect Damage with improved Spirit scaling. Increased lunge speed & distance.

name: Itani Lo Sahn
description: Charge up and perform a long range slash. Struck enemies cannot take action or heal and are stuck in slow motion. When this effect expires, they suffer devastating damage, dealing bonus damage against half-health enemies. While in slow motion, Apollo is invulnerable and enemies take reduced damage. Hold Ability 4 or to delay the cast.

name: Grasping Hands
description: Unearth a line of grasping hands, summoning a Ghoul and leaving behind a rift. Enemies who pass through take spirit damage and receive immobilize. Alt-Cast rotates the orientation of the wall.

name: Jar of Dead
description: Passive: Collect death when anything dies nearby and store it in your Jar of Dead. Active: Throw a jar to summon Deadheads that repeatedly deal spirit damage to enemies. Deadheads follow you instead if there's no nearby enemies, and prioritize the target of your weapon.
tier_descriptions: Collecting death heals 5 health per pickup

name: Borrowed Decree
tier_descriptions: On Death: Deal +5% Current Health as Damage

name: Borrow Life
description: Kill a Ghoul or low-health ally, gaining their lifeforce.: Throw the lifeforce as a bomb, dealing spirit damage.: Consume the lifeforce, receiving healing.

name: Back Off!
description: Gain a barrier and bonus move speed. When the barrier expires you release a ring of necrotic energy, dealing spirit damage and applying slow.

name: Essence Theft
description: Your weapon steals weapon damage and spirit resist over time, up to a maximum amount per target.
tier_descriptions: All Summons now apply Essence Theft

name: Haunting Spectres
description: Grant an ally bonus move speed and spectres which orbit around them. The spectres will seek nearby enemies, dealing spirit damage and applying slow.

name: Slam Fire
description: Instantly reload your gun. You gain bonus fire rate and deal bonus weapon damage based on the target's health for a limited number of shots, but suffer from reduced accuracy.
tier_descriptions: If you hit all shots, deal +7% current health as damage

name: Boot Kick
tier_descriptions: +80 Bonus Damage and kicked enemies deal -35% Damage for 5s

name: Mauling Leap
description: Leap forward, mauling the first enemy hit for melee damage. They suffer from reduced bullet resist and take spirit damage over time.

name: Entangling Bola
description: Throw a bola, dealing spirit damage, applying slow and preventing movement abilities or stamina.
tier_descriptions: +0.75s Debuff Duration. Bola ricochets to 2 additional targets

name: Tail Whack
description: Smash enemies around you, dealing spirit damage. They suffer from disarm and a brief slow.

name: Lycan Curse
description: Passive: Dealing damage generates bloodlust, increased at low health. At max bloodlust, you automatically cast Lycan Curse. Active: Instantly transform, gaining increased max health, and stacking fire rate on enemy heroes, and replacing your abilities and weapon with their ferocious versions.
tier_descriptions: +4 m/s Move Speed and 200 Bonus Health
On Hero Kill: Refresh abilities and duration

name: ability_werewolf_passive
description: Human: Track the last hero you hit. Killing tracked enemies grants bonus souls. Werewolf: Track any low-health heroes nearby. Killing tracked heroes reduce your cooldowns.

name: On The Hunt
description: Gain bonus fire rate and bonus move speed, half to nearby allies. Kills during this time recasts On The Hunt.

name: End the Curse
description: Return back to your human form.

name: Go For The Throat
description: Deal melee damage to all enemies in front of you, receiving a heal for a portion of the damage dealt. The damage is increased the lower health they have.

name: Crushing Leap
description: Leap through the air before landing, dealing melee damage and applying slow to nearby enemies while pushing them away.
tier_descriptions: On Landing: +2 m/s Move Speed for 5s

name: Light Eater
description: Blast enemies in a cone in front of you with a flare of light. Blasted enemies take spirit damage when attacked by Celeste and provides her spirit lifesteal.

name: Dazzling Trick
description: Surround yourself in a protective prism. If the barrier is destroyed, it silences nearby enemies and deals a portion of the barrier as damage.
tier_descriptions: +80 Barrier and Increased Barrier Spirit Scaling
+1.5 Silence Duration and -18s Cooldown. Allows Shining Wonder Bounce.

name: Shining Wonder
description: Launch a deadly orb of light that deals spirit damage and applies slow and reduces Dash Distance on impact. The orb then bounces to the enemies within range. If no target is found, the orb will linger for a short duration while continuing to look for targets. Prioritizes enemy heroes when picking targets.

name: Radiant Daggers
description: Call down a beam of light from the sky. After a short duration, the beam will fully form, causing an explosion that deals spirit damage to all targets in the area. Celeste will receive a stacking buff that increases her spirit damage anytime this hits an enemy hero.
